The '''A-23 Treeduster''' was a type of [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] made by [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]]. The ship had a substantial cargo capacity.

One A-23 with a cargo of turbolaser pieces crashed near [[Cloud Mountain]], [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]], in [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: Revelation and Refutation}}
